title: CPP ERROR: Request for a member that is non class type

features.name: package-scoped struct with logic members as unpacked array element type
features.description: Code should include a struct defined in a package with logic-typed members, used as the element type of an unpacked array input port

features.name: unpacked array of struct passed through module port
features.description: Code should include a module input port declared as an unpacked array of a package-defined struct type

features.name: struct member access through array index on unpacked struct array
features.description: Code should include accessing a struct member via array indexing on an unpacked array of structs
features.snippet:
input t_mem arr [7:0];
wire b = arr[0].BIST;
